response:
# Cheaper Salesforce Alternatives

## **Lightweight & Budget-Friendly**

| Platform | Price | Best For |
|----------|-------|----------|
| **HubSpot CRM** | Free tier available | Small teams, startups |
| **Pipedrive** | $14-99/user/mo | Sales-focused teams |
| **Zoho CRM** | $18-55/user/mo | Cost-conscious scaling |
| **monday.com CRM** | $10-24/user/mo | Project-oriented sales |

## **By Use Case**

**For Startups**
- HubSpot CRM (free features are generous)
- Pipedrive (clean, sales-specific)

**For Service/Support**
- Zoho CRM (strong ecosystem)
- Freshsales (good support tools)

**For Simplicity**
- monday.com Sales
- Close (automation-heavy)

**For Very Small Teams**
- Insightly ($29-99/mo flat)
- Copper (Google Workspace integration)

## **Key Differences from Salesforce**

✅ **Typically better:**
- Easier to implement
- Lower onboarding costs
- Simpler customization (less coding)
- All-in pricing vs. per-feature add-ons

⚠️ **Typically weaker:**
- Enterprise scalability
- Advanced customization
- API complexity
- Built-in ecosystem (Salesforce AppExchange)

## **Pro Tip**
Most offer free trials. Test 2-3 with your actual workflow before deciding.

**Which use case matters most to you?** I can narrow recommendations further.
